figures.caption: FIG. 3. Band structures of the t-phase calculated with U = 4.5 eV in the (a) symmetry-unconstrained chargedisproportionated [20] and (b) symmetry-constrained nondisproportionated cases. (a) and (b) have the same tstructure relaxed by a symmetry-constrained calculation at U = 4.5 eV. (c) Eg and (d) Bader ∆N calculated with different U and DBA. For DBA = 0, symmetry was turned off, and CD was allowed. (e) The Eg vs ∆N relation from (c)(d). (f) Schematic interplay among several key physical quantities.
